Developer Console

OAuth Providers

Connect external services by configuring OAuth providers for your agents.

Please sign in to manage your OAuth providers.

Go to Console

OAuth Providers

Bring your own OAuth credentials

Bring Your Own Credentials (BYOC): Register OAuth providers with your own client IDs and secrets. When users connect through your agent, tokens are stored securely and used for tool execution.

Loading your OAuth providers...

Connected Tokens

Active OAuth tokens connected by users.

Loading tokens...

Add OAuth Provider

Stored encrypted. Leave empty when editing to keep existing secret.
Add this to your OAuth app's allowed redirect URIs.
